page: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram is a fractional GPU instance within the Cloud GPU family. It features 4 shared vCPUs mapped to 2 physical Intel x86_64 cores running at 2.0 GHz, alongside 20.0 GB of system memory. The instance is equipped with a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, providing 8 GB of dedicated VRAM, and includes 360 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.

Performance benchmarks indicate a bifurcation between general compute and specialized GPU workloads. The instance achieves top-tier results in LLM inference, processing 9881.81 tokens per second for a small 135M model and 3161.22 tokens per second for a medium 7B model. Conversely, general CPU and memory operations sit in the average tier, with a Passmark CPU score of 7273.24 and stress-ng multi-core performance of 7057.24.

Tradeoffs are evident in database and cryptographic operations, where the instance registers weak performance, such as a Passmark database score of 1916.13 and weak static web serving throughput of 5.81 GB/sec. The shared CPU allocation also limits multi-threaded decompression efficiency. Qualitatively, this fractional GPU profile offers a cost-efficient entry point for low-intensity machine learning inference and model prototyping without the expense of a dedicated full-size GPU.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram is a fractional GPU instance designed for entry-level machine learning and accelerated workloads. It features 4 shared Intel vCPUs, 20.0 GB of system memory, 360 GB of NVMe SSD storage, and a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. Benchmark data highlights top-tier performance in LLM inference, reaching 3161.22 tokens per second for prompt processing on a medium 7B model. However, the shared CPU architecture introduces tradeoffs, resulting in average general compute scores and weak performance in database operations and cryptography. This instance represents a cost-efficient option for developers requiring GPU acceleration for small-scale model deployment, prototyping, and lightweight parallel processing tasks without the overhead of a dedicated GPU.
og_description: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram is a fractional GPU instance featuring 4 shared Intel vCPUs, 20 GB RAM, 360 GB NVMe storage, and an NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 8 GB VRAM for entry-level AI workloads.
meta_description: Vultr vcg-a40-4c-20g-8vram is a fractional GPU instance with 4 shared vCPUs, 20 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA A40 GPU with 8 GB VRAM.
tagline: A fractional GPU instance combining shared Intel processors with NVIDIA Ampere acceleration for budget-conscious machine learning inference and prototyping.
bullet_points: Fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM
4 shared Intel vCPUs and 20.0 GB of system memory
360 GB of local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier performance in small and medium LLM inference tasks
Suited for lightweight machine learning, prototyping, and parallel processing
